data.body: PASS 1 (A1 — anti-slop / config-surface) coaching note: AC1's "config flag disables the plan-review gate (fail-open when off)" appears to duplicate the gate's EXISTING enable toggle `verify.require_plan_review_for_claim` (docs/plan-review-gate.md:38: "when verify.require_plan_review_for_claim is on, claim ... blocks ... off => fail-open"). The prior adjudication (docs/experiments/plan-review-finalize-and-threepass.md:114-121) already concluded "config-disable IS the kill-switch / rollback" and closed follow-on ce75 as resolved-by-design. Recommend AC1 reuse the existing flag (off=disabled) rather than introduce a distinct new "disable" key, to avoid config-surface proliferation (cf. the parallel close-gate flag verify.require_signature_for_close in src/rebar/config.py:245 + src/rebar/_commands/txn.py:269). Posting as a non-blocking coaching note per the comment-only review role.
